title: Flaky Portuguese Zucchini Fritters
description: A crispy, golden delight that combines the flavors of Portugal with the freshness of zucchini. Perfect as a side dish or snack.

ingredients.name: All-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: Make sure to use gluten-free flour if needed

instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
In a large bowl, combine the flour, salt, and grated zucchini.
Add the flaky pastry dough to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters hot and enjoy!
